Icepaw Skull Helm  
 


Slot: HEAD
AC: 22
STA: +5 CHA: -35
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR SHD ROG BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HEAD
AC: 22
STA: +5 CHA: -35
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR SHD ROG BER

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded July 8th, 2023 by Craigy
Updated July 9th, 2023
Send a correction
Post Comment
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 14 2002 at 5:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Neg CHA does affect warriors and anyother clas that has taunt. It increases your ability to taunt. The lower your CHA, the less liked you are, i.e. the higher you are on the mobs' hate list. For taunt to succeed, you have to stay at the top of the mobs' hate list. Anything that will put my warrior higher on the hate list is something I want. I have tested this out and with a CHA of 25, I can out-taunt warriors up to 4 lvls higher than I. When I have a CHA of 60 or better, I lose that edge. So yes, I want this for my warrior and when or if I ever get it, I will use it rigorously while fighting.
RE: Neg CHA for Warriors
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2002 at 12:11 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591772719125
Sage
361 posts
Charisma has nothing to do with taunt. go find what VI have published about it. Go find what people who have gone through spattdef files etc have written about it.

If you're outtaunting higher level warriors, I can guarentee you, it isn't because you have low Cha

Edited, Tue Apr 30 21:17:41 2002
▲ Page top
i swear...
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2002 at 1:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248967229
79 posts
i wish allakahzam would make a filter that gets rid of all "low cha = better fear" posts im tired of hearing about it heh ive tested it with 8 cha and with 167 cha and ya wanna know the difference? maybe 3-4 seconds if that and if your playing where 3 seconds makes THAT much of a difference then maybe its time to look into another class to play. I just love the fact that theres people running around wearing that iksar pariah mask or things with -30 cha just cause they read somewhere that "fear lasts longer"
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 10:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770921746
53 posts
I want this helm now, i hope it looks like a plate helm. With the luc graphics i'll look creapy as anything, plus the minus CHA will make my instil doubt skill work better, and that really upstes a guy, running for no reason, and getting backstabed, plus my poison procs. Oh i cant wait for it hehe.

Bhindu Nightfall(look the GM jacked my name)
currently 33(the whole leveling junk) Rogue Of Inny

#Shakuden, Posted: Jan 07 2002 at 4:25 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) CHA has to do with FEAR, only in that it helps your chances, it doesn't lower your chances, duh, if something was pretty you think you'd be afraid of it? NOO

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 17 2001 at 10:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) For a SK to have a better succes at Fearing mobs its better to have a Lower CHA so the lower the the better helps when soloing :o) as for the AC who could complain about ac 22 especialy on a IKSar SK

# Jan 16 2001 at 1:16 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Is it possible to have negative charisma on your characer? if so my character will ahve -2 charisma when i put this on. Never heard of anyone having negatice charisma before though. Maybe it will just put charisma at 1 or 0? Anybody know the answers to these questions please reply.

Thanks =)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 07 2001 at 3:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I dont see how you people can survive in Norrath is such a low charisma.. .. what do vendors charge you people with a 20-cha.. first born child?
RE: Negative Charisma?
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2001 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757018363
6 posts
Simple... when you go to the store, you take it off and put it in your backpack... when you are done with your shopping, you put it back on.
▲ Page top
RE: Negative Charisma?
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2001 at 8:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756713665
2 posts
Well, the answer to that is simple.. You either have a muley character for yourself with high CHA, you have a friend with better charisma buy your goods, *or* you just take the difference in price (which isn't really all that much) and deal with it.
▲ Page top
RE: Negative Charisma?
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2001 at 12:58 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The minimum value for all stats is 1. Go to bank and convert all your pp to coppers, then carry them on you. Your AGI will drop down to 1. Nothing lower.

# Jan 16 2001 at 5:02 AM Rating: Default

Those are damn good stats! I would take -100 cha as long as it gave me 22 ac.

▲ Page top
a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 8:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592343949949
Scholar
233 posts
Keep in mind folks using these items that are minus to Cha will effect your ability to use fear spells. I believe that is why Verant has been adding so many items of late for necros/SKs that have Cha penalties to reduce the use of Fear kiting. Just a thought as you load up on some of these items.
▲ Page top
RE: a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 4:43 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
CHA has absolutly no affect on fear spells. My sk regularly has a cha of 24 and i have no problem at all with fear being resisted or lasting for short durations.
▲ Page top
RE: a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 4:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Cha does effect fear the lower the cha the better your fear works, it was posted on Eq castersrealm a couple of months ago. My necro has a char of 20 and fear last forever.
▲ Page top
RE: a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 10:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i'm not so sure of this. i've used fear kiting tactics before with my enchanter friend casting fear. his charisma is well over 150 and doesn't have any problems with the spell.
▲ Page top
RE: a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2001 at 5:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965823950
12 posts
fear as per class is regulated more less by the character attributes , evil races benefit from lower charisma like SK and necro where enchanters are set up to utilize hi charisma for their spells. and ugly enchater will not charm or fear well as a a hi charisma necro will not fear well , it has to do with class set up for how pos or neg charisma affect fear spells. they set it up this way to try to make sense in what our classes strenghts are , not what they should be..IMOHP.
Tehn again i am just yakkin from sleep depravation :)
▲ Page top
RE: a thought to the wise
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2001 at 11:56 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
CHA doesn't seem to do anything to fear...Don't believe everything you see online =P
▲ Page top
MYTH
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750484951
33 posts
This MYTH has been going around SO long its not funny. VI finally came out and said that CHA has NO effect on fear spells at all, and only a MINOR effect on charms (with the major being level difference).

It truely amazes me that after almost 3 years people don't understand the game better.

Docc
▲ Page top
Charisma is only prices and charm
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 9:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts

Never heard of it doing anything with fear. It affects saving throws for creatures for bards and enchanters on charm (meaning the more the bard or enchanter has the better) It affects prices.

That is what verant said it affected.

I believe fear is a target saving throw spell, affected by the targets magic resistence with nothing at all to do with charisma of the caster.

▲ Page top
RE: Charisma is only prices and charm
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2001 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245758864
126 posts
Verent doesnt always tell all, you don't have to play very long to figure that out. Not sure either way on cha. Heard for and aginst it on fear.
Affects Mez's, Charm's, Stun's though, along with magic resistance.
▲ Page top
RE: Charisma is only prices and charm
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 11:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759888631
67 posts
it hardly affects mez, it strongly affects charm, it dosent affect ench stuns from my logs, it has *no* effect on fear from my old logs (like 3 months old)

do *your OWN* tests before you repeat what you read. kthx
